title: IISER Kolkata | Home
text_content: Notice: IISER KOLKATA AMONG TOP 10 RESEARCH INSTITUTES IN INDIA | Beware of Fraudulent Job Offers using the name of IISER Kolkata | INTERNATIONAL STUDENTS CAN APPLY THROUGH THE STUDY IN INDIA PORTAL About IISER Kolkata Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Kolkata (IISER Kolkata) was established in 2006 by the Ministry of Human Resource Development (now Ministry of Education), Government of India. IISER Kolkata is designed to reach the prestigious position in the global setting that IISc, IIMs and IITs presently enjoy. IISER Kolkata is an autonomous institution awarding its own degrees. The central theme of the IISER Kolkata is to integrate education with research so that undergraduate teaching as well as doctoral and postdoctoral research work could be carried out in basic sciences. 0 + Students 0 + Faculty Members 0 + Research Papers 0 + Patents News, Events & Announcements Announcement IISER Kolkata Summer School 2026 (ISKool) Recruitment 16th International Symposium on Ionic Polymerization (IP’26) | November 15 - 19, 2026 IISER Admissions Aptitude Test 2026 | Sunday, June 7 2026 Project Positions EoI & Tenders Study in India Program Website E-booklet containing the COVID-related Research & Development Works done by CFTIs Global Initiative of Academic Networks (GIAN) Certificate course on Animal Handling & Research (New) Newsletter Autumn 2026 admission(New) International Women’s Day 2026 Admin - Mar 22, 2026 Documentary on IISER Kolkata | 2025 Admin - Mar 22, 2026 InScight | The IISER Kolkata Science Magazine | September 2025 Edition Admin - Mar 22, 2026 More About News & Events Campus Life PRATAP 2025 marked IISER Kolkata’s first-ever inter-college athletics meet PRATAP 2025 marked IISER Kolkata’s first-ever inter-college athletics meet - a celebration of strength, speed, and sportsmanship. Over two action-packed days (8-9th November), athletes from across institutes came together to compete, connect, and create history on our newly prepared athletics ground. The event witnessed enthusiastic participation from colleges nearby, making it a true convergence of athletic talent and spirit. PRATAP 2025 marks the beginning of a new sporting legacy at IISER Kolkata. Click Here Inquivesta Inquivesta – the country's largest science festival, hosted by IISER-Kolkata – was started in 2011, to ignite curiosity in young minds. Currently in its 10th edition, the fest sees participation of more than 1000 students from more than 100 colleges and schools across the country. The fest brings with it exciting events, seminars and workshops that cater to the interests of all students across India - the future scientists and engineers; the artists and dramatists; the dreamers and the doers. Click Here for the Website Inquivesta@IISERK Click Here E-cell The Entrepreneurship Cell of IISER Kolkata fosters the kindling of an entrepreneurial spirit in the student community and promote the conversion of fledgling ideas into real-world businesses. The E-Cell works in tandem with the IISER Kolkata incubation center: RISE foundation. It organizes events and provides resources to support budding student entrepreneurs. Click Here for the Website E-Cell @IISERK Click Here Slashdot Club Slashdot is IISER Kolkata's Coding and Designing Club. They regularly host workshops and competitions in various programming languages and design software. They also promote open-source projects and competitive programming to develop stellar programmers and designers.
